expanded_market_policy.reason: Historical profitability is unvalidated, the nominal holdout has been used for development feedback, source prices are stale, and conditional fixtures require intervening results.
expanded_market_policy.selection_rule: rank independent structural-model EV and stressed EV; use market-implied probability only as a disagreement/risk diagnostic, never as an input to the probability evaluating that same quote

research_mode_policy.why_selected: Dixon-Coles is the selected tested shadow candidate because it is football-specific, low-parameter, and reproducible with the available score data. Other registered candidates have not all been fit and compared, so this is not a claim that Dixon-Coles is globally best. High-capacity temporal graph and sequence models remain blocked by the sample-size/edge-count promotion gate.
research_mode_policy.why_not_promoted: Shadow paired-bootstrap intervals cross zero and no timestamp-verified historical closing odds exist for profitability validation.

promotion_requirements.validation: nested walk-forward selection, untouched holdout superiority, calibration checks, multiple-testing control, and closing-line ROI/CLV validation

evaluation_governance.reason: The nominal holdout informed prior development decisions and cannot be described as untouched or confirmatory.

warning.en: No stake is allocated unless every actionability gate passes. Historical profitability is not validated, so this release allocates zero.
warning.es: No se asigna monto salvo que todas las puertas de acción pasen. La rentabilidad histórica no está validada, por lo que esta versión asigna cero.

risk_note.en: Gross return assumes every selection fully wins; Asian pushes or half-results can reduce it. The model-estimated net is not historically validated.
risk_note.es: El retorno bruto supone que todas las selecciones ganan completamente; nulos o medias liquidaciones asiáticas pueden reducirlo. El neto estimado no está validado históricamente.

risk_note.en: Gross return assumes every selection fully wins; Asian pushes or half-results can reduce it. The model-estimated net is not historically validated.
risk_note.es: El retorno bruto supone que todas las selecciones ganan completamente; nulos o medias liquidaciones asiáticas pueden reducirlo. El neto estimado no está validado históricamente.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Argentina win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 56.5% means roughly 56 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Argentina
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 56.5% significa aproximadamente 56 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 27.4% means roughly 27 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 27.4% significa aproximadamente 27 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Austria win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 16.2% means roughly 16 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Austria
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 16.2% significa aproximadamente 16 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Argentina
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.00 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Argentina
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.00 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Austria
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.75 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Austria
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.75 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 45.6% is the model probability; 2.19 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 45.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.19 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 54.4% is the model probability; 1.84 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 54.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.84 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Argentina -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 66.7% is the model win probability; 1.50 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Argentina -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 66.7% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 1.50 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: As known by 2026-06-21, Argentina entered after a 3-0 win over Algeria on 2026-06-16; Austria entered after a 3-1 win over Jordan on 2026-06-17. Austria's opener was level until the 77th minute before an own goal and a stoppage-time Marko Arnautovic penalty.
research.injuries_suspensions: Austria: Christoph Baumgartner was reported before the tournament as missing through injury. Argentina: Cristian Romero had carried a recent injury into the selected squad, but a match-specific availability update by the 2026-06-21 cutoff was unavailable. Suspensions for either team: unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available by the cutoff. Argentina were expected to retain their experienced core around Lionel Messi, Julian Alvarez/Lautaro Martinez and the established midfield; any rotation is unconfirmed. Austria's previewed core included David Alaba, Konrad Laimer, Marcel Sabitzer and Arnautovic; Baumgartner was unavailable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group J after one match: Argentina 3 pts, GD +3; Austria 3 pts, GD +2. The winner would take sole control of first place and be strongly positioned to advance; both still had a final group match on 2026-06-27.
research.weather_venue_notes: Dallas Stadium in Arlington is the 94,000-capacity AT&T Stadium and has a retractable roof with climate control, reducing direct weather exposure if closed. A reliable match-time roof decision and forecast were unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: France win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 68.6% means roughly 69 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Francia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 68.6% significa aproximadamente 69 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 24.2% means roughly 24 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 24.2% significa aproximadamente 24 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Iraq win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 7.1% means roughly 7 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Irak
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 7.1% significa aproximadamente 7 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: France
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.28 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Francia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.28 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Iraq
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.47 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Irak
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.47 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 33.5% is the model probability; 2.98 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 33.5% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.98 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 66.5% is the model probability; 1.50 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 66.5% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.50 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: France -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 78.7% is the model win probability; 1.27 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Francia -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 78.7% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 1.27 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: France arrived after beating Senegal 3-1 on 2026-06-16, with Kylian Mbappe scoring twice and becoming France's record men's scorer according to the cited report. Iraq lost 4-1 to Norway the same day but created periods of pressure and equalized before a goalkeeper error restored Norway's lead.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions for France or Iraq were found by the 2026-06-21 cutoff; unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: A 2026-06-21 report said Bradley Barcola could replace Ousmane Dembele after Barcola scored as a substitute against Senegal; other defensive and midfield changes were described as possible, not confirmed. Iraq's confirmed XI or changes from the Norway match were unavailable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group I after one match: France 3 pts, GD +2; Iraq 0 pts, GD -3. France could move to six points and close on qualification; Iraq needed points to avoid entering the final match in a severely disadvantaged position.
research.weather_venue_notes: Philadelphia Stadium is Lincoln Financial Field, an open-air venue, with kickoff scheduled for 17:00 local on 2026-06-22. A reliable match-time weather forecast was unavailable in the reviewed sources by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: New York New Jersey Stadium, East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Norway win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 41.3% means roughly 41 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Noruega
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 41.3% significa aproximadamente 41 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.5% means roughly 32 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.5% significa aproximadamente 32 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Senegal win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 27.2% means roughly 27 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Senegal
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 27.2% significa aproximadamente 27 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Norway
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.61 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Noruega
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.61 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Senegal
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.14 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Senegal
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.14 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 54.4% is the model probability; 1.84 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 54.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.84 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 45.6% is the model probability; 2.19 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 45.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.19 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Norway -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 48.2% is the model win probability; 2.07 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Noruega -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 48.2% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.07 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Norway opened with a 4-1 win over Iraq on 2026-06-16; Erling Haaland scored twice, although the match report noted defensive vulnerability during Iraq's stronger spells. Senegal lost 3-1 to France on 2026-06-16.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions for Norway or Senegal were found by the 2026-06-21 cutoff; unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Norway's established attacking structure centers on Haaland with Martin Odegaard supplying chances, while pre-tournament analysis described a compact 4-4-2 and quick transitions. Senegal lineup changes after the France defeat were unavailable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group I after one match: Norway 3 pts, GD +3; Senegal 0 pts, GD -2. Norway could reach six points and move close to qualification; Senegal needed a result before its final match against Iraq on 2026-06-26.
research.weather_venue_notes: New York New Jersey Stadium is the open-air MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, capacity 82,500, with a 20:00 local kickoff. A reliable match-time weather forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium, Santa Clara, California, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Jordan win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 26.2% means roughly 26 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Jordania
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 26.2% significa aproximadamente 26 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.1% means roughly 31 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.1% significa aproximadamente 31 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Algeria win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 42.7% means roughly 43 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Argelia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 42.7% significa aproximadamente 43 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Jordan
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.10 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Jordania
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.10 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Algeria
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.65 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Argelia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.65 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 53.9% is the model probability; 1.85 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 53.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.85 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 46.1% is the model probability; 2.17 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 46.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.17 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Jordan -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 25.5% is the model win probability; 3.92 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Jordania -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 25.5% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 3.92 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Jordan lost 3-1 to Austria on 2026-06-17 but produced four shots on target to Austria's two and Ali Olwan scored Jordan's first World Cup goal. Algeria lost 3-0 to Argentina on 2026-06-16.
research.injuries_suspensions: Jordan: star striker Yazan Al-Naimat was reported before the tournament as missing through injury. Algeria: match-specific injury and suspension information by the cutoff was unavailable. No confirmed suspensions were found for Jordan.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Jordan must plan without Al-Naimat; otherwise changes from the Austria match were unavailable. Algeria's expected core included Riyad Mahrez, Amine Gouiri, Houssem Aouar, Ibrahim Maza, Rayan Ait-Nouri and Ramy Bensebaini, but selection and shape were unconfirmed.
research.motivation_group_state: Group J after one match: Jordan 0 pts, GD -2; Algeria 0 pts, GD -3. This was a high-leverage match between the bottom two: a loss would leave either side near elimination, while a win would restore a realistic route to a top-two or best-third-place finish.
research.weather_venue_notes: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium is the open-air Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara, with a 20:00 local kickoff on 2026-06-22. A reliable match-time weather forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Portugal win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 59.8% means roughly 60 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Portugal
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 59.8% significa aproximadamente 60 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 26.5% means roughly 26 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 26.5% significa aproximadamente 26 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Uzbekistan win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 13.8% means roughly 14 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Uzbekistán
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 13.8% significa aproximadamente 14 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Portugal
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.08 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Portugal
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.08 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Uzbekistan
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.67 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Uzbekistán
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.67 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 42.7% is the model probability; 2.34 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 42.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.34 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 57.3% is the model probability; 1.75 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 57.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.75 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Portugal -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 70.3% is the model win probability; 1.42 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Portugal -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 70.3% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 1.42 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Verify lineup, injury, motivation, and weather freshness.
Compare production and research score distributions.
Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.

Verifica vigencia de alineación, lesiones, motivación y clima.
Compara distribuciones de marcador de producción e investigación.
Exige evidencia cronológica fuera de muestra antes de cambiar umbrales de producción.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Portugal drew 1-1 with Congo DR on 2026-06-17. Uzbekistan lost 3-1 to Colombia in its first World Cup match the same day. Pre-tournament reporting described Portugal as tactically flexible between a back three and back four with an aggressive press, and Uzbekistan as defense-first and counterattacking under Fabio Cannavaro.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions for Portugal or Uzbekistan were found by the 2026-06-21 cutoff; unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Cristiano Ronaldo remained the focal selection question for Portugal, with Bruno Fernandes identified as the primary creative influence; whether Ronaldo would start was unconfirmed by the cutoff. Uzbekistan were expected to retain a compact structure featuring Abdukodir Khusanov, but changes after the Colombia loss were unavailable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group K after one match: Portugal 1 pt, GD 0; Uzbekistan 0 pts, GD -2. Portugal needed a win to keep pace with Colombia; Uzbekistan needed points to preserve a credible path to qualification before facing Congo DR on 2026-06-27.
research.weather_venue_notes: Houston Stadium is NRG Stadium, a retractable-roof, climate-controlled venue. A roof decision and reliable match-time external-weather forecast were unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: England win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 59.3% means roughly 59 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Inglaterra
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 59.3% significa aproximadamente 59 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 26.6% means roughly 27 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 26.6% significa aproximadamente 27 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Ghana win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 14.1% means roughly 14 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Ghana
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 14.1% significa aproximadamente 14 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: England
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.07 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Inglaterra
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.07 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Ghana
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.68 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Ghana
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.68 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 43.2% is the model probability; 2.32 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 43.2% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.32 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 56.8% is the model probability; 1.76 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 56.8% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.76 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: England -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 69.8% is the model win probability; 1.43 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.number_meaning: 69.8% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 1.43 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: England beat Croatia 4-2 on 2026-06-17 and led Group L on goal difference. Ghana beat Panama 1-0, setting up a meeting of the group's two opening winners.
research.injuries_suspensions: England: Tino Livramento was ruled out of the tournament with a calf injury on 2026-06-16 and replaced by Trevoh Chalobah. Bukayo Saka was managing an Achilles problem and was not considered ready for 90 minutes. Declan Rice had upper-hamstring/lower-back nerve pain but said on 2026-06-21 he was fit; Marcus Rashford returned to training after a minor muscular issue. Ghana: match-specific confirmed injury or suspension information was unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Noni Madueke was expected to start again on England's right, with Saka likely on the bench. Rice and Rashford trained, but Rashford was competing with Anthony Gordon on the left. Ghana's confirmed XI and changes from the Panama win were unavailable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group L after one match: England 3 pts, GD +2; Ghana 3 pts, GD +1. The winner would take sole control and be strongly placed to qualify; a draw would leave both unbeaten before the final round.
research.weather_venue_notes: Boston Stadium is the open-air Gillette Stadium in Foxborough, listed at about 65,000 capacity for the tournament, with a 16:00 local kickoff. A reliable match-time weather forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Panama win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 21.0% means roughly 21 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Panamá
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 21.0% significa aproximadamente 21 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 29.1% means roughly 29 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 29.1% significa aproximadamente 29 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Croatia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 49.8% means roughly 50 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Croacia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 49.8% significa aproximadamente 50 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Panama
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.92 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Panamá
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.92 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Croatia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.83 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Croacia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.83 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 50.4% is the model probability; 1.99 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 50.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.99 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 49.6% is the model probability; 2.02 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 49.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.02 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Panama -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 18.4% is the model win probability; 5.44 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Panamá -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 18.4% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 5.44 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.
