predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Panama lost 1-0 to Ghana on 2026-06-17; Croatia lost 4-2 to England the same day after England pulled away in the second half. Both entered their second match without a point.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions for Panama or Croatia were found by the 2026-06-21 cutoff; unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Confirmed lineups and credible match-specific predicted changes were unavailable. Any assumption that Croatia would retain its veteran midfield or that Panama would change its attack is unconfirmed and therefore omitted.
research.motivation_group_state: Group L after one match: Croatia 0 pts, GD -2; Panama 0 pts, GD -1. This was a must-improve contest: defeat would put either team close to elimination, while a win would revive top-two and best-third-place prospects.
research.weather_venue_notes: Toronto Stadium is the expanded, open-air BMO Field, listed around 45,000 capacity for the tournament, with a 19:00 local kickoff. A reliable match-time weather forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Colombia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 52.5% means roughly 53 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Colombia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 52.5% significa aproximadamente 53 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 28.4% means roughly 28 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 28.4% significa aproximadamente 28 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Congo DR win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 19.1% means roughly 19 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de RD Congo
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 19.1% significa aproximadamente 19 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Colombia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.90 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Colombia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.90 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Congo DR
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.85 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: RD Congo
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.85 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.6% is the model probability; 2.06 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.06 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 51.4% is the model probability; 1.95 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 51.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.95 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Colombia -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 62.3% is the model win probability; 1.61 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Colombia -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 62.3% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 1.61 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Colombia beat Uzbekistan 3-1 on 2026-06-17; Congo DR drew 1-1 with Portugal. Colombia midfielder Juan Camilo Portilla suffered the death of his grandfather during the camp; the Colombian federation issued condolences, but the cited 2026-06-20 report did not say he had left camp or was unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions for Colombia or Congo DR were found by the 2026-06-21 cutoff; unavailable. Portilla's bereavement is team news, not an injury, and his playing status was unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Pre-tournament analysis identified Luis Diaz and James Rodriguez as Colombia's primary attacking creators and Yoane Wissa as Congo DR's key forward, but changes from the opening matches were unavailable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group K after one match: Colombia 3 pts, GD +2; Congo DR 1 pt, GD 0. A Colombia win could secure or nearly secure advancement depending on the earlier Portugal-Uzbekistan result; Congo DR could take a major step toward qualification with a result.
research.weather_venue_notes: Estadio Guadalajara is the open-air Estadio Akron in Zapopan, listed around 48,000 capacity, with a 20:00 local kickoff. A reliable match-time weather forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Switzerland win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.7% means roughly 32 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Suiza
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.7% significa aproximadamente 32 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 33.4% means roughly 33 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 33.4% significa aproximadamente 33 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Canada win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 34.8% means roughly 35 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Canadá
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 34.8% significa aproximadamente 35 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Switzerland
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.32 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Suiza
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.32 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Canada
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.43 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Canadá
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.43 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.8% is the model probability; 1.79 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.8% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.79 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 44.2% is the model probability; 2.26 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 44.2% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.26 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Switzerland -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 34.8% is the model win probability; 2.87 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Suiza -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 34.8% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.87 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Switzerland followed a 1-1 draw with Qatar by beating Bosnia and Herzegovina 4-1. Canada followed a 1-1 draw with Bosnia and Herzegovina by beating nine-man Qatar 6-0; Jonathan David scored a hat-trick, but the win was overshadowed by Ismael Kone's severe injury.
research.injuries_suspensions: Canada: Ismael Kone suffered fractures of the left tibia and fibula, underwent successful surgery and is out for the tournament. Alphonso Davies had not played in Canada's first two matches while returning to fitness; match-specific availability for Switzerland was unavailable. Confirmed suspensions: none found for either team.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Canada are likely to replace Kone in midfield with Nathan Saliba, who came on and scored against Qatar. Davies' starting status remained unconfirmed by the cutoff. No confirmed XI or reliable Switzerland change report was available; Switzerland could retain the core that beat Bosnia 4-1.
research.motivation_group_state: Group B: Canada 4 pts, GD +6; Switzerland 4 pts, GD +3. A draw sends both through and leaves Canada first. The loser could be caught on four points by the Bosnia-Qatar winner, so neither side is mathematically secure before kickoff.
research.weather_venue_notes: BC Place is an enclosed/retractable-roof venue, limiting direct weather exposure if the roof is closed. A reliable roof decision and match-time forecast for June 24 were unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Bosnia and Herzegovina win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 44.4% means roughly 44 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Bosnia y Herzegovina
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 44.4% significa aproximadamente 44 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 30.6% means roughly 31 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 30.6% significa aproximadamente 31 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Qatar win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 25.0% means roughly 25 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Catar
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 25.0% significa aproximadamente 25 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Bosnia and Herzegovina
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.69 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Bosnia y Herzegovina
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.69 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Qatar
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.06 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Catar
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.06 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 53.2% is the model probability; 1.88 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 53.2% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.88 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 46.8% is the model probability; 2.14 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 46.8% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.14 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Bosnia and Herzegovina -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 52.3% is the model win probability; 1.91 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Bosnia y Herzegovina -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 52.3% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 1.91 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Compara distribuciones de marcador de producción e investigación.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Bosnia and Herzegovina drew 1-1 with Canada before losing 4-1 to Switzerland. Qatar drew 1-1 with Switzerland, then lost 6-0 to Canada in a match in which they finished with nine players.
research.injuries_suspensions: Qatar: Homam Ahmed and Assim Madibo are suspended after red cards against Canada; Madibo was sent off for the challenge that broke Ismael Kone's leg. Bosnia and Herzegovina: match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Qatar must make at least two changes because Ahmed and Madibo are suspended. Bosnia's confirmed XI was unavailable; an attacking approach is expected because a draw is insufficient for a realistic qualification route, but personnel and formation are unconfirmed.
research.motivation_group_state: Group B: Bosnia and Herzegovina 1 pt, GD -3; Qatar 1 pt, GD -6. Both need a win. The winner reaches four points and could take second if Switzerland or Canada loses by enough, or otherwise contend for a best-third-place berth; a draw almost certainly eliminates both.
research.weather_venue_notes: Seattle Stadium is the open-air Lumen Field. A reliable match-time forecast for the 12:00 local kickoff on June 24 was unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: Miami Stadium, Miami Gardens, Florida, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Scotland win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 19.0% means roughly 19 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Escocia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 19.0% significa aproximadamente 19 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 28.4% means roughly 28 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 28.4% significa aproximadamente 28 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Brazil win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 52.6% means roughly 53 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Brasil
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 52.6% significa aproximadamente 53 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Scotland
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.84 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Escocia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.84 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Brazil
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.91 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Brasil
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.91 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.5% is the model probability; 2.06 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.5% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.06 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 51.5% is the model probability; 1.94 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 51.5% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.94 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Scotland -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 16.0% is the model win probability; 6.24 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Escocia -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 16.0% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 6.24 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Verify lineup, injury, motivation, and weather freshness.
Compare production and research score distributions.
Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.

Verifica vigencia de alineación, lesiones, motivación y clima.
Compara distribuciones de marcador de producción e investigación.
Exige evidencia cronológica fuera de muestra antes de cambiar umbrales de producción.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Scotland beat Haiti 1-0 and then lost 1-0 to Morocco. Brazil drew 1-1 with Morocco and beat Haiti 3-0. Scotland reporting emphasized that their qualification fate remained in their own hands despite limited attacking output.
research.injuries_suspensions: Brazil: Raphinha has a right-hamstring muscle injury and is ruled out of this match. Neymar was expected to be available after his calf rehabilitation, but his exact role was unconfirmed. Scotland: Aaron Hickey was not expected back unless Scotland advanced; Scott McKenna and Lewis Ferguson were being monitored. Confirmed suspensions were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Brazil must replace Raphinha; Neymar could enter the XI or receive managed minutes, but no confirmed lineup was available. Scotland indicated a balanced rather than purely defensive plan. McKenna/Ferguson fitness could affect selection; otherwise a major reshuffle was not confirmed.
research.motivation_group_state: Group C: Brazil 4 pts, GD +3; Morocco 4 pts, GD +1; Scotland 3 pts, GD 0; Haiti 0 pts, GD -4. Brazil guarantee advancement with a draw and can win the group. Scotland qualify with a win; a draw gives four points and a strong best-third-place chance but may not secure the top two.
research.weather_venue_notes: Miami Stadium is the open-air Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens, where heat, humidity and storms can matter. A reliable match-time forecast for June 24 was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Morocco win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 63.6% means roughly 64 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Marruecos
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 63.6% significa aproximadamente 64 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 25.5% means roughly 26 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 25.5% significa aproximadamente 26 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Haiti win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 10.9% means roughly 11 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Haití
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 10.9% significa aproximadamente 11 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Morocco
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.17 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Marruecos
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.17 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Haiti
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.58 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Haití
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.58 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 39.0% is the model probability; 2.56 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 39.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.56 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 61.0% is the model probability; 1.64 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 61.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.64 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Morocco -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 74.1% is the model win probability; 1.35 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Marruecos -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 74.1% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 1.35 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Morocco drew 1-1 with Brazil and beat Scotland 1-0. Haiti lost 1-0 to Scotland and 3-0 to Brazil. Haiti's pre-tournament identity was a disciplined, transition-focused 4-4-2/4-2-3-1 built around Johny Placide, Jean-Ricner Bellegarde and Duckens Nazon.
research.injuries_suspensions: Morocco: Abde Ezzalzouli suffered a medial-knee-ligament sprain before the tournament and was expected to miss three to four weeks; Noussair Mazraoui had a shoulder issue but was expected to be fit. Haiti: match-specific confirmed injuries and suspensions were unavailable. Confirmed suspensions for Morocco were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Morocco are expected to continue without Ezzalzouli, with Achraf Hakimi and Brahim Diaz central to progression and chance creation; rotation is possible but unconfirmed. Haiti's likely structure remains compact and counterattacking, with Placide in goal and Nazon/Pierrot as attacking references; no confirmed XI was available.
research.motivation_group_state: Group C: Morocco 4 pts, GD +1; Haiti 0 pts, GD -4. Morocco guarantee advancement with a draw and can win the group. Haiti must win to reach three points and then need Scotland to lose plus favorable goal-difference and best-third-place results; elimination remains the overwhelmingly likely outcome.
research.weather_venue_notes: Atlanta Stadium is Mercedes-Benz Stadium, a retractable-roof, climate-controlled venue. Roof status and a reliable match-time forecast were unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: Monterrey Stadium, Guadalupe, Nuevo Leon, Mexico

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: South Africa win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 27.7% means roughly 28 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Sudáfrica
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 27.7% significa aproximadamente 28 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.8% means roughly 32 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.8% significa aproximadamente 32 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: South Korea win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 40.5% means roughly 40 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Corea del Sur
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 40.5% significa aproximadamente 40 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: South Africa
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.16 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Sudáfrica
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.16 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: South Korea
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.59 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Corea del Sur
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.59 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 54.7% is the model probability; 1.83 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 54.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.83 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 45.3% is the model probability; 2.21 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 45.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.21 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: South Africa -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 27.9% is the model win probability; 3.58 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Sudáfrica -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 27.9% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 3.58 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Compare production and research score distributions.
Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.

Verifica vigencia de alineación, lesiones, motivación y clima.
Compara distribuciones de marcador de producción e investigación.
Exige evidencia cronológica fuera de muestra antes de cambiar umbrales de producción.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: South Africa lost 2-0 to Mexico and drew 1-1 with Czechia. South Korea beat Czechia 2-1 and lost 1-0 to Mexico. No reliable match-specific team-news report was found by the cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: Match-specific confirmed injuries and suspensions for South Africa and South Korea were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Confirmed XIs and reliable predicted changes were unavailable. South Korea's established attacking reference is captain Son Heung-min, while South Africa need a more aggressive approach than in the opening loss; specific personnel or shape changes are unconfirmed.
research.motivation_group_state: Group A: South Korea 3 pts, GD 0; South Africa 1 pt, GD -2. South Korea guarantee at least second with a win; a draw may be enough depending on Czechia-Mexico. South Africa must win and then compare points, goal difference and the parallel result for second or third.
research.weather_venue_notes: Monterrey Stadium is the open-air Estadio BBVA in Guadalupe. Heat can be significant at an 19:00 local kickoff, but a reliable match-time forecast for June 24 was unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: Mexico City Stadium, Mexico City, Mexico

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Czechia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 26.8% means roughly 27 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Chequia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 26.8% significa aproximadamente 27 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.4% means roughly 31 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.4% significa aproximadamente 31 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Mexico win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 41.8% means roughly 42 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de México
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 41.8% significa aproximadamente 42 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Czechia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.13 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Chequia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.13 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Mexico
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.62 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: México
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.62 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 54.3% is the model probability; 1.84 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 54.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.84 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 45.7% is the model probability; 2.19 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 45.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.19 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Czechia -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 26.5% is the model win probability; 3.78 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Chequia -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 26.5% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 3.78 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.
