predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Czechia lost 2-1 to South Korea and drew 1-1 with South Africa. Host Mexico beat South Africa 2-0 and South Korea 1-0, taking maximum points without conceding. Current match-specific reporting was limited by the cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: Match-specific confirmed injuries and suspensions for Czechia and Mexico were unavailable. Czechia's final squad omitted goalkeepers Vitezslav Jaros and Antonin Kinsky, but those were roster decisions/availability before the tournament rather than new match injuries.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Czechia's attacking plan is expected to continue through Patrik Schick, supported by players such as Adam Hlozek, Pavel Sulc and Lukas Provod. Mexico may rotate after securing advancement, but any changes around Raul Jimenez or the defensive unit are unconfirmed.
research.motivation_group_state: Group A: Mexico 6 pts, GD +3 and are guaranteed a top-two place; a draw secures first. Czechia have 1 pt, GD -1 and must win to reach four points, then need the South Korea-South Africa result and tiebreakers to determine second or a best-third-place route.
research.weather_venue_notes: Mexico City Stadium is the open-air Estadio Azteca at roughly 2,200 metres elevation, making altitude a material factor. A reliable match-time forecast for June 24 was unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: New York New Jersey Stadium, East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Ecuador vs Germany and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Germany”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 1.95; the model fair-price threshold is 1.73.
Treat this research-mode rank one as a sensitivity check only. Do not replace the production recommendation unless the model promotion gates are passed in a future release.

Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 1.95; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 1.73.
Trata este rango uno de investigación solo como prueba de sensibilidad. No reemplaza la recomendación de producción salvo que futuras puertas de promoción se superen.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Ecuador vs Germany and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Ecuador”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 3.60; the model fair-price threshold is 6.04.
Treat this as an alternative, not an extra forced bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, and current price before deciding whether it should replace rank one.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Ecuador vs Alemania y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Ecuador”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 3.60; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 6.04.
Trátala como alternativa, no como apuesta adicional forzada. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos y cuota actual antes de decidir si debe reemplazar al rango uno.

en.title: Ecuador win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 20.9% means roughly 21 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Ecuador
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 20.9% significa aproximadamente 21 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 29.1% means roughly 29 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 29.1% significa aproximadamente 29 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Germany win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 50.1% means roughly 50 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Alemania
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 50.1% significa aproximadamente 50 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Ecuador
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.91 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Ecuador
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.91 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Germany
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.84 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Alemania
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.84 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 50.2% is the model probability; 1.99 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 50.2% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.99 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 49.8% is the model probability; 2.01 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 49.8% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.01 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Ecuador -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 18.2% is the model win probability; 5.50 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Ecuador -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 18.2% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 5.50 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Ecuador lost 1-0 to Ivory Coast and drew 0-0 with Curacao despite generating heavy pressure. Germany beat Curacao 7-1 and came from behind to beat Ivory Coast 2-1; substitute Deniz Undav scored twice and Germany clinched advancement.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed Ecuador injuries or suspensions were found. Germany: no confirmed new absence was reported after the Ivory Coast match; confirmed suspensions were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Germany may start Undav after his two-goal substitute appearance and could change midfield after Aleksandar Pavlovic's subdued display; rotation is plausible because qualification is secured, but no XI was confirmed. Ecuador need more finishing threat after failing to score in two matches; specific changes were unavailable.
research.motivation_group_state: Group E: Germany 6 pts, GD +7 and are qualified; a draw wins the group. Ecuador 1 pt, GD -1 and must beat Germany to reach four points, then need the Curacao-Ivory Coast result and tiebreakers for second or third.
research.weather_venue_notes: New York New Jersey Stadium is the open-air MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford. A reliable match-time forecast for the 16:00 local kickoff on June 25 was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Curacao win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 19.7% means roughly 20 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Curazao
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 19.7% significa aproximadamente 20 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 28.6% means roughly 29 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 28.6% significa aproximadamente 29 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Ivory Coast win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.6% means roughly 52 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Costa de Marfil
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.6% significa aproximadamente 52 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Curacao
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.87 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Curazao
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.87 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Ivory Coast
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.88 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Costa de Marfil
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.88 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 49.2% is the model probability; 2.03 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 49.2% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.03 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 50.8% is the model probability; 1.97 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 50.8% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.97 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Curacao -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 16.8% is the model win probability; 5.94 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Curazao -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 16.8% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 5.94 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Curacao vs Ivory Coast and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Ivory Coast”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 1.16; the model fair-price threshold is 1.94.
Treat rank one as the primary comparison, not a mandatory bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, current price, and team news before deciding.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Curazao vs Costa de Marfil y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Costa de Marfil”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 1.16; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 1.94.
Trata el rango uno como la comparación principal, no como apuesta obligatoria. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos, cuota actual y noticias antes de decidir.

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Curacao rebounded from a 7-1 loss to Germany by drawing 0-0 with Ecuador, with goalkeeper Eloy Room making a reported 15 saves. Ivory Coast beat Ecuador 1-0 and then lost 2-1 to Germany after leading through Franck Kessie.
research.injuries_suspensions: Ivory Coast: Wilfried Singo suffered a left-hamstring injury against Germany and was considered highly unlikely to play again in the tournament, although the exact grade was unavailable. Curacao: no match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions were found. Confirmed suspensions for either team were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Curacao are expected to retain Eloy Room after his exceptional display and again use a compact, reactive setup. Ivory Coast must replace Singo at right-back; Franck Kessie and Yan Diomande remain key based on the Germany match. No confirmed XI was available.
research.motivation_group_state: Group E: Ivory Coast 3 pts, GD 0; Curacao 1 pt, GD -6. Ivory Coast guarantee advancement with a win and may advance with a draw depending on Ecuador-Germany. Curacao must win to reach four points and then rely on the parallel result and substantial tiebreaker help.
research.weather_venue_notes: Philadelphia Stadium is the open-air Lincoln Financial Field. A reliable match-time forecast for the 16:00 local kickoff on June 25 was unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: Kansas City Stadium, Kansas City, Missouri, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Tunisia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 11.1% means roughly 11 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Túnez
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 11.1% significa aproximadamente 11 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 25.6% means roughly 26 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 25.6% significa aproximadamente 26 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Netherlands win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 63.3% means roughly 63 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Países Bajos
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 63.3% significa aproximadamente 63 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Tunisia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.59 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Túnez
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.59 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Netherlands
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.16 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Países Bajos
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.16 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 39.4% is the model probability; 2.54 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 39.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.54 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 60.6% is the model probability; 1.65 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 60.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.65 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Tunisia -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 8.7% is the model win probability; 11.47 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Túnez -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 8.7% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 11.47 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

en: Small, shifted historical holdout.
Screenshot price and team information can move before kickoff.
Historical profitability is not validated.
es: Holdout histórico pequeño y con cambio de régimen.
La cuota y la información de equipos pueden cambiar antes del inicio.
La rentabilidad histórica no está validada.

why_ranked.en: Ranked by conservative expected-value utility after market disagreement and family-risk penalties.
why_ranked.es: Clasificada por utilidad conservadora de valor esperado tras penalizar desacuerdo de mercado y riesgo del mercado.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Tunisia vs Netherlands and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Netherlands”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 1.15; the model fair-price threshold is 1.58.
Treat rank one as the primary comparison, not a mandatory bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, current price, and team news before deciding.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Túnez vs Países Bajos y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Países Bajos”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 1.15; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 1.58.
Trata el rango uno como la comparación principal, no como apuesta obligatoria. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos, cuota actual y noticias antes de decidir.

explanation.en: HALT under this lens: candidate divergence 19.7pp vs maximum 22.5pp; stressed EV -30.7% vs minimum -20.0%; risk grade D vs allowed A/B/C/D; fair-price gate not met.
explanation.es: HALT con este lente: desacuerdo 19.7pp frente al máximo 22.5pp; EV estresado -30.7% frente al mínimo -20.0%; grado de riesgo D frente a los permitidos A/B/C/D; umbral de cuota justa no cumplido.

explanation.es: HALT con este lente: desacuerdo 19.7pp frente al máximo 5.0pp; EV estresado -30.7% frente al mínimo 3.0%; grado de riesgo D frente a los permitidos A; umbral de cuota justa no cumplido.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Tunisia lost 5-1 to Sweden, dismissed coach Sabri Lamouchi, appointed Herve Renard, and then lost 4-0 to Japan. The Netherlands drew 2-2 with Japan and beat Sweden 5-1.
research.injuries_suspensions: Netherlands: Frenkie de Jong played about an hour against Sweden despite a minor issue and said he still felt manageable pain; his availability/workload for this match was uncertain. Tunisia: no match-specific confirmed player injuries or suspensions were found. Managerial change is confirmed.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: The Netherlands may manage or rest De Jong and could rotate, but still need a result to secure their exact finishing position. Tunisia changed goalkeeper and shape/personnel under Renard against Japan, using a back three and moving Hannibal Mejbri into a midfield two; further changes are unconfirmed.
research.motivation_group_state: Group F: Netherlands 4 pts, GD +4; Japan 4 pts, GD +4; Sweden 3 pts, GD 0; Tunisia 0 pts, GD -8. Tunisia are eliminated. The Netherlands guarantee advancement with a win and should advance with a draw; first place depends on Japan-Sweden and tiebreakers.
research.weather_venue_notes: Kansas City Stadium is the open-air Arrowhead Stadium. A reliable match-time forecast for the 18:00 local kickoff on June 25 was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Japan vs Sweden and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Japan”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 1.93; the model fair-price threshold is 2.00.
Treat this research-mode rank one as a sensitivity check only. Do not replace the production recommendation unless the model promotion gates are passed in a future release.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Japón vs Suecia y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Japón”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 1.93; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 2.00.
Trata este rango uno de investigación solo como prueba de sensibilidad. No reemplaza la recomendación de producción salvo que futuras puertas de promoción se superen.

en.title: Japan win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 44.0% means roughly 44 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Japón
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 44.0% significa aproximadamente 44 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 30.8% means roughly 31 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 30.8% significa aproximadamente 31 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Sweden win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 25.3% means roughly 25 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Suecia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 25.3% significa aproximadamente 25 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Japan
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.68 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Japón
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.68 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Sweden
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.07 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Suecia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.07 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 53.4% is the model probability; 1.87 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 53.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.87 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 46.6% is the model probability; 2.15 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 46.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.15 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Japan -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 51.7% is the model win probability; 1.93 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Japón -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 51.7% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Japan drew 2-2 with the Netherlands and beat Tunisia 4-0, with Ayase Ueda scoring twice in a 3-4-3. Sweden beat Tunisia 5-1 but then lost 5-1 to the Netherlands.
research.injuries_suspensions: Japan: Takefusa Kubo missed the Tunisia match with a knee injury; Kaoru Mitoma and Takumi Minamino were absent from the tournament, and Wataru Endo was also unavailable for the Tunisia match. Match-specific Sweden injuries or suspensions were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Japan are likely to retain the 3-4-3 and Ueda as the central forward; Kubo's return was unconfirmed, while Tomiyasu and Itakura strengthened the back three against Tunisia. Sweden are expected to continue building around Viktor Gyokeres and Alexander Isak, but no confirmed XI or reliable change report was available.
research.motivation_group_state: Group F: Japan 4 pts, GD +4; Sweden 3 pts, GD 0. Japan guarantee advancement with a draw and can win the group. Sweden qualify with a win; a draw gives four points and may be enough as a best third-placed team depending on other groups.
research.weather_venue_notes: Dallas Stadium is AT&T Stadium, a retractable-roof, climate-controlled venue. Roof status and a reliable match-time external forecast were unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium, Santa Clara, California, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Paraguay win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 35.8% means roughly 36 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Paraguay
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 35.8% significa aproximadamente 36 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 33.2% means roughly 33 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 33.2% significa aproximadamente 33 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Australia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.1% means roughly 31 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Australia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.1% significa aproximadamente 31 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Paraguay
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.46 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Paraguay
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.46 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Australia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.29 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Australia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.29 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.7% is the model probability; 1.80 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.80 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 44.3% is the model probability; 2.26 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 44.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.26 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Paraguay -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 40.9% is the model win probability; 2.44 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Paraguay -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 40.9% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.44 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Paraguay lost 4-1 to the USA and beat Turkiye 1-0. Australia beat Turkiye 2-0 and lost 2-0 to the USA. Australia described Paraguay as unpredictable, aggressive and physically demanding ahead of a match likely to decide second place.
research.injuries_suspensions: Paraguay: Miguel Almiron is suspended after a red card against Turkiye. Julio Enciso suffered an injury before the tournament; an early report suggested a possible return for the Australia match, but his availability remained unconfirmed by the cutoff. Australia: match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: Paraguay must replace Almiron; Enciso's potential return cannot be assumed. Australia are likely to retain Tony Popovic's aggressive 3-4-2-1 framework with Jackson Irvine and Aiden O'Neill central, Harry Souttar in defence and Nestory Irankunda/Mohamed Toure among the attacking options; no confirmed XI was available.
research.motivation_group_state: Group D: Australia 3 pts, GD 0; Paraguay 3 pts, GD -2. The winner reaches six points and secures advancement. A draw leaves both on four and sends second place/two best-third-place prospects to goal difference and the Turkiye-USA result.
research.weather_venue_notes: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium is the open-air Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara. A reliable match-time forecast for the 18:00 local kickoff on June 25 was unavailable by the cutoff.

predictions.venue: Los Angeles Stadium, Inglewood, California, USA

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Turkiye win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 23.2% means roughly 23 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Turquía
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 23.2% significa aproximadamente 23 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 30.0% means roughly 30 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 30.0% significa aproximadamente 30 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: USA win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 46.8% means roughly 47 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Estados Unidos
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 46.8% significa aproximadamente 47 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Turkiye
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.99 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Turquía
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.99 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: USA
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.76 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Estados Unidos
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.76 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 52.1% is the model probability; 1.92 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 52.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.92 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 47.9% is the model probability; 2.09 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 47.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.09 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Turkiye -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 21.2% is the model win probability; 4.72 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Turquía -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 21.2% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 4.72 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Turkiye lost 2-0 to Australia and 1-0 to Paraguay. The USA beat Paraguay 4-1 and Australia 2-0 to clinch knockout-stage qualification. Without Christian Pulisic against Australia, Mauricio Pochettino used Ricardo Pepi alongside Folarin Balogun in a successful two-striker setup.
research.injuries_suspensions: USA: Christian Pulisic missed the Australia match with a left-calf injury; his recovery was progressing, but availability for Turkiye was not confirmed by the cutoff. Turkiye: match-specific confirmed injuries or suspensions were unavailable.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: The USA could retain Pepi-Balogun, revert to a one-striker system, or rotate because qualification is secured; Pulisic's status is the main selection variable. Turkiye's expected creative core includes Arda Guler, Kenan Yildiz and Hakan Calhanoglu in a fluid 4-2-3-1, but no confirmed XI was available.
research.motivation_group_state: Group D: USA 6 pts, GD +5 and are qualified; a draw secures first. Turkiye 0 pts, GD -3 must beat the USA to reach three points and also need a loser in Paraguay-Australia plus favorable goal-difference and best-third-place comparisons.
research.weather_venue_notes: Los Angeles Stadium is SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, covered by a fixed translucent roof but open at the sides. Direct rain is limited, though temperature/airflow can still matter. A reliable match-time forecast was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Norway vs France and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Norway”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 4.15; the model fair-price threshold is 4.83.
Treat this as an alternative, not an extra forced bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, and current price before deciding whether it should replace rank one.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Noruega vs Francia y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Noruega”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 4.15; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 4.83.
Trátala como alternativa, no como apuesta adicional forzada. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos y cuota actual antes de decidir si debe reemplazar al rango uno.
