en.title: Norway win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 24.1% means roughly 24 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Noruega
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 24.1% significa aproximadamente 24 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 30.3% means roughly 30 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 30.3% significa aproximadamente 30 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: France win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 45.6% means roughly 46 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Francia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 45.6% significa aproximadamente 46 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Norway
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.02 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Noruega
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.02 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: France
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.73 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Francia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.73 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 52.7% is the model probability; 1.90 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 52.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.90 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 47.3% is the model probability; 2.11 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 47.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.11 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Norway -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 22.4% is the model win probability; 4.46 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Noruega -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 22.4% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 4.46 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Norway opened with a 4-1 win over Iraq, led by two Erling Haaland goals and a Leo Ostigard goal; France beat Senegal 3-1, with Kylian Mbappe scoring twice. Their June 22 second matches had not been played by the June 21 cutoff, so later form and team news were unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: No match-specific confirmed Norway or France injury absence was found by the cutoff. France defender William Saliba was reported to be managing persistent niggles while continuing to play; his June 26 availability was unavailable. Confirmed suspensions: unavailable because the June 22 matches could still create them.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Norway's established attacking structure centers on Haaland with Martin Odegaard supplying chances; Ostigard had started and scored against Iraq. France's opening-match attack was led by Mbappe, while Bradley Barcola was a plausible option after scoring as a substitute; changes after the intervening June 22 match were unknowable at the cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Group I as of June 21: Norway 3 pts, GD +3; France 3 pts, GD +2; Senegal 0, Iraq 0. Both teams still had June 22 matches, so the exact qualification requirement and rotation incentive for this final fixture were unavailable. The match was positioned to have first-place significance, but that was not yet guaranteed.
research.weather_venue_notes: Boston Stadium is the open-air Gillette Stadium in Foxborough, with a 15:00 local kickoff. Late-June heat or storms are possible, but a reliable match-time forecast for June 26 and any heat-protocol decision were unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Senegal win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 53.4% means roughly 53 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Senegal
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 53.4% significa aproximadamente 53 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 28.2% means roughly 28 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 28.2% significa aproximadamente 28 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Iraq win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 18.5% means roughly 18 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Irak
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 18.5% significa aproximadamente 18 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Senegal
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.92 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Senegal
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.92 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Iraq
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.83 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Irak
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.83 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.0% is the model probability; 2.08 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 52.0% is the model probability; 1.92 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 52.0% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.92 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Senegal -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 63.2% is the model win probability; 1.58 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Senegal -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 63.2% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 1.58 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Screenshot price and team information can move before kickoff.
Historical profitability is not validated.

why_ranked.es: Clasificada por utilidad conservadora de valor esperado tras penalizar desacuerdo de mercado y riesgo del mercado.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Senegal vs Iraq and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Senegal”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 1.31; the model fair-price threshold is 1.87.
Treat rank one as the primary comparison, not a mandatory bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, current price, and team news before deciding.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Senegal vs Irak y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Senegal”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 1.31; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 1.87.
Trata el rango uno como la comparación principal, no como apuesta obligatoria. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos, cuota actual y noticias antes de decidir.

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Senegal lost 3-1 to France in their opener. Iraq lost 4-1 to Norway after equalizing and producing a spell of pressure before Norway pulled away. Their June 22 second matches had not been played by the cutoff; reliable later team news was unavailable.
research.injuries_suspensions: Match-specific confirmed injuries for Senegal or Iraq were unavailable. Confirmed suspensions were also unavailable because cards or dismissals in the intervening June 22 matches could affect June 26.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed XI was available. Senegal changes after the France defeat were unavailable. Iraq's opener showed they could press and create against Norway, but the goalkeeper error that restored Norway's lead and subsequent defensive concessions could prompt changes; personnel and formation were unconfirmed.
research.motivation_group_state: Group I as of June 21: Senegal 0 pts, GD -2; Iraq 0 pts, GD -3. Both still had June 22 matches, so the exact final-round qualification state was unavailable. At the cutoff both needed points in match two to avoid arriving in Toronto near elimination; June 26 could still decide second or a best-third-place route.
research.weather_venue_notes: Toronto Stadium is the expanded, open-air BMO Field, with a 15:00 local kickoff. A reliable match-time forecast for June 26 was unavailable by the cutoff.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Uruguay win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 17.0% means roughly 17 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Uruguay
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 17.0% significa aproximadamente 17 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 27.6% means roughly 28 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 27.6% significa aproximadamente 28 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Spain win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.3% means roughly 55 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de España
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.3% significa aproximadamente 55 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Uruguay
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.78 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Uruguay
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.78 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Spain
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.97 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: España
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.97 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 46.5% is the model probability; 2.15 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 46.5% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.15 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 53.5% is the model probability; 1.87 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 53.5% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.87 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Uruguay -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 13.9% is the model win probability; 7.21 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Uruguay -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 13.9% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 7.21 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Screenshot price and team information can move before kickoff.
Historical profitability is not validated.
es: Holdout histórico pequeño y con cambio de régimen.
La cuota y la información de equipos pueden cambiar antes del inicio.
La rentabilidad histórica no está validada.

why_ranked.en: Ranked by conservative expected-value utility after market disagreement and family-risk penalties.
why_ranked.es: Clasificada por utilidad conservadora de valor esperado tras penalizar desacuerdo de mercado y riesgo del mercado.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Uruguay vs Spain and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Draw”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 4.30; the model fair-price threshold is 3.62.
Treat rank one as the primary comparison, not a mandatory bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, current price, and team news before deciding.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Uruguay vs España y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Empate”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 4.30; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 3.62.
Trata el rango uno como la comparación principal, no como apuesta obligatoria. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos, cuota actual y noticias antes de decidir.

explanation.en: PASS under this lens: candidate divergence 5.6pp vs maximum 22.5pp; stressed EV 6.0% vs minimum -20.0%; risk grade A vs allowed A/B/C/D; fair-price gate met.
explanation.es: PASS con este lente: desacuerdo 5.6pp frente al máximo 22.5pp; EV estresado 6.0% frente al mínimo -20.0%; grado de riesgo A frente a los permitidos A/B/C/D; umbral de cuota justa cumplido.

explanation.en: PASS under this lens: candidate divergence 5.6pp vs maximum 10.0pp; stressed EV 6.0% vs minimum 0.0%; risk grade A vs allowed A/B/C; fair-price gate met.

explanation.en: PASS under this lens: candidate divergence 5.6pp vs maximum 7.5pp; stressed EV 6.0% vs minimum 2.0%; risk grade A vs allowed A/B; fair-price gate met.
explanation.es: PASS con este lente: desacuerdo 5.6pp frente al máximo 7.5pp; EV estresado 6.0% frente al mínimo 2.0%; grado de riesgo A frente a los permitidos A/B; umbral de cuota justa cumplido.

profile_description.en: Keeps only cleaner A/B-grade candidates with a positive stressed cushion.
profile_description.es: Mantiene solo candidatas A/B más limpias con colchón estresado positivo.

explanation.en: HALT under this lens: candidate divergence 5.6pp vs maximum 5.0pp; stressed EV 6.0% vs minimum 3.0%; risk grade A vs allowed A; fair-price gate met.
explanation.es: HALT con este lente: desacuerdo 5.6pp frente al máximo 5.0pp; EV estresado 6.0% frente al mínimo 3.0%; grado de riesgo A frente a los permitidos A; umbral de cuota justa cumplido.

profile_description.en: Demands very low disagreement and strong stress evidence; most rows become HALT.
profile_description.es: Exige desacuerdo muy bajo y fuerte evidencia estresada; la mayoría pasa a HALT.

Verify lineup, injury, motivation, and weather freshness.
Compare production and research score distributions.
Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Reliable post-opening-match updates were unavailable by the June 21 research cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: Unavailable by the June 21 cutoff; later match reports were excluded.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed lineup was available by the June 21 cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Final-round qualification state depended on intervening matches and was unavailable by the cutoff.
research.weather_venue_notes: Venue is documented in the canonical fixture file; reliable match-time weather was unavailable.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for Cape Verde vs Saudi Arabia and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “Draw”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 3.45; the model fair-price threshold is 3.44.
Treat this research-mode rank one as a sensitivity check only. Do not replace the production recommendation unless the model promotion gates are passed in a future release.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Cabo Verde vs Arabia Saudita y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Empate”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 3.45; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 3.44.
Trata este rango uno de investigación solo como prueba de sensibilidad. No reemplaza la recomendación de producción salvo que futuras puertas de promoción se superen.

en.title: Cape Verde win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 36.0% means roughly 36 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Cabo Verde
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 36.0% significa aproximadamente 36 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 33.1% means roughly 33 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 33.1% significa aproximadamente 33 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Saudi Arabia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 30.9% means roughly 31 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Arabia Saudita
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 30.9% significa aproximadamente 31 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Cape Verde
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.46 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Cabo Verde
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.46 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Saudi Arabia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.29 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Arabia Saudita
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.29 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.6% is the model probability; 1.80 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.6% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.80 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 44.4% is the model probability; 2.25 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 44.4% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.25 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Cape Verde -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 41.2% is the model win probability; 2.42 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Cabo Verde -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 41.2% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.42 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Verify lineup, injury, motivation, and weather freshness.
Compare production and research score distributions.
Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.

Verifica vigencia de alineación, lesiones, motivación y clima.
Compara distribuciones de marcador de producción e investigación.
Exige evidencia cronológica fuera de muestra antes de cambiar umbrales de producción.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Reliable post-opening-match updates were unavailable by the June 21 research cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: Unavailable by the June 21 cutoff; later match reports were excluded.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed lineup was available by the June 21 cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Final-round qualification state depended on intervening matches and was unavailable by the cutoff.
research.weather_venue_notes: Venue is documented in the canonical fixture file; reliable match-time weather was unavailable.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Egypt win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 34.7% means roughly 35 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Egipto
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 34.7% significa aproximadamente 35 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 33.5% means roughly 33 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 33.5% significa aproximadamente 33 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Iran win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 31.8% means roughly 32 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Irán
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 31.8% significa aproximadamente 32 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Egypt
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.42 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Egipto
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.42 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Iran
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.33 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Irán
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.33 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.8% is the model probability; 1.79 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.8% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.79 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 44.2% is the model probability; 2.26 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 44.2% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.26 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Egypt -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 39.5% is the model win probability; 2.53 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Egipto -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 39.5% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.53 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Compare production and research score distributions.
Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.

Verifica vigencia de alineación, lesiones, motivación y clima.
Compara distribuciones de marcador de producción e investigación.
Exige evidencia cronológica fuera de muestra antes de cambiar umbrales de producción.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Reliable post-opening-match updates were unavailable by the June 21 research cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: Unavailable by the June 21 cutoff; later match reports were excluded.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed lineup was available by the June 21 cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Final-round qualification state depended on intervening matches and was unavailable by the cutoff.
research.weather_venue_notes: Venue is documented in the canonical fixture file; reliable match-time weather was unavailable.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: New Zealand win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 13.7% means roughly 14 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Nueva Zelanda
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 13.7% significa aproximadamente 14 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 26.5% means roughly 26 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 26.5% significa aproximadamente 26 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Belgium win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 59.8% means roughly 60 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Bélgica
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 59.8% significa aproximadamente 60 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: New Zealand
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 0.67 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Nueva Zelanda
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 0.67 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Belgium
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 2.08 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Bélgica
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 2.08 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 42.7% is the model probability; 2.34 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 42.7% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.34 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 57.3% is the model probability; 1.75 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 57.3% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.75 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: New Zealand -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 10.8% is the model win probability; 9.28 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Nueva Zelanda -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 10.8% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 9.28 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

en: Open Betano, then Sports → Football → World Cup.
Search for New Zealand vs Belgium and confirm the kickoff date shown on this card.
Open the market named “Match Result”.
Choose exactly “New Zealand”. Do not substitute a nearby handicap or total line.
Check the current decimal price. The saved screenshot price is 13.50; the model fair-price threshold is 7.29.
Treat this as an alternative, not an extra forced bet. Recheck the selection, line, 90-minute settlement, and current price before deciding whether it should replace rank one.
es: Abre Betano y entra a Deportes → Fútbol → Mundial.
Busca Nueva Zelanda vs Bélgica y confirma la fecha de inicio mostrada en esta tarjeta.
Abre el mercado llamado “Resultado del partido”.
Elige exactamente “Nueva Zelanda”. No sustituyas por una línea de hándicap o total parecida.
Revisa la cuota decimal actual. La cuota guardada en la captura es 13.50; el umbral de cuota justa del modelo es 7.29.
Trátala como alternativa, no como apuesta adicional forzada. Revisa selección, línea, liquidación a 90 minutos y cuota actual antes de decidir si debe reemplazar al rango uno.

en: Verify current app price and settlement line.
Verify lineup, injury, motivation, and weather freshness.
Compare production and research score distributions.
Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.

Verifica vigencia de alineación, lesiones, motivación y clima.
Compara distribuciones de marcador de producción e investigación.
Exige evidencia cronológica fuera de muestra antes de cambiar umbrales de producción.

predictions.recommendation_scope: up to four distinct sourced non-actionable comparisons are ranked per fixture by stressed EV, disagreement, and family-validation penalties; recommendation remains null, rank_one_comparison is audit-only, and historical profitability is not validated

en: Football outcomes remain high variance even when expected value is positive.
Late lineup, injury, tactical, weather, or motivation changes can invalidate the estimate.
Re-check the exact app price before any decision; moved odds change expected value.
es: Los resultados de fútbol siguen teniendo alta varianza aunque el valor esperado sea positivo.
Cambios tardíos de alineación, lesión, táctica, clima o motivación pueden invalidar la estimación.
Vuelve a revisar la cuota exacta en la app; un cambio de cuota cambia el valor esperado.

research.team_news: Reliable post-opening-match updates were unavailable by the June 21 research cutoff.
research.injuries_suspensions: Unavailable by the June 21 cutoff; later match reports were excluded.
research.predicted_lineup_notes: No confirmed lineup was available by the June 21 cutoff.
research.motivation_group_state: Final-round qualification state depended on intervening matches and was unavailable by the cutoff.
research.weather_venue_notes: Venue is documented in the canonical fixture file; reliable match-time weather was unavailable.

research_mode.selected_from_registry_reason: Best currently feasible research-gated architecture: it adds a low-parameter football-specific low-score dependence correction without violating the current sample-size gate. Temporal GNN, GraphMixer/DyGFormer, and transformer candidates remain registered but not fit for production.
research_mode.why_not_production: The paired-bootstrap confidence interval for score NLL crosses zero and timestamp-verified historical closing odds are absent, so this mode is educational/shadow analysis only.

student_note.en: Research mode shows the best currently reproducible gated shadow model. It is useful for learning and sensitivity analysis, not for replacing the production recommendation.
student_note.es: El modo investigación muestra el mejor modelo sombra reproducible y limitado por evidencia. Sirve para aprender y analizar sensibilidad, no para reemplazar la recomendación de producción.

en.title: Croatia win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the first listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 38.7% means roughly 39 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Croacia
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el primer equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 38.7% significa aproximadamente 39 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Draw probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the score is level after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 32.3% means roughly 32 draws in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de empate
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el marcador termine igualado tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 32.3% significa aproximadamente 32 empates en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Ghana win probability
en.category_meaning: The model probability that the second listed team wins after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 29.0% means roughly 29 wins in 100 comparable model scenarios.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Probabilidad de victoria de Ghana
es.category_meaning: La probabilidad del modelo de que el segundo equipo gane tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 29.0% significa aproximadamente 29 victorias en 100 escenarios comparables del modelo.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Expected goals: Croatia
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the first listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.54 is an average, not a score prediction. For example, 0.51 means about half a goal per simulated match, so both 0 and 1 goal remain common outcomes.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand scoring strength and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. Do not read 0.51 as a 51% chance.

es.title: Goles esperados: Croacia
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el primer equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.54 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Por ejemplo, 0,51 significa cerca de medio gol por simulación, por lo que 0 y 1 gol siguen siendo resultados comunes.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la capacidad goleadora y revisar totales de equipo, ambos marcan o hándicap. No interpretes 0,51 como 51% de probabilidad.

en.title: Expected goals: Ghana
en.category_meaning: Expected goals here is the model's average goal count for the second listed team across many simulated versions of this match.
en.number_meaning: 1.21 is an average, not a score prediction. A value below 1.00 suggests a lower scoring outlook but does not mean the team cannot score.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to understand the second team's scoring outlook and to inspect team-total, BTTS, or handicap markets. It is not a percentage.

es.title: Goles esperados: Ghana
es.category_meaning: Goles esperados es el promedio de goles del modelo para el segundo equipo en muchas simulaciones de este partido.
es.number_meaning: 1.21 es un promedio, no un marcador exacto. Un valor menor que 1,00 sugiere menor expectativa goleadora, pero no significa que el equipo no pueda marcar.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para entender la expectativa goleadora del segundo equipo y revisar totales, ambos marcan o hándicap. No es un porcentaje.

en.title: Over 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has at least 3 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 51.9% is the model probability; 1.93 is the model's break-even decimal price before bookmaker margin.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current Over 2.5 price with the fair price. A higher app price may be more attractive, but model and lineup risk still apply.

es.title: Más de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con al menos 3 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 51.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.93 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio antes del margen de la casa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual de Más de 2,5 con la cuota justa. Una cuota mayor puede ser más atractiva, pero siguen existiendo riesgos del modelo y alineaciones.

en.title: Under 2.5 total goals
en.category_meaning: This wins when the match has 0, 1, or 2 total goals after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 48.1% is the model probability; 2.08 is its break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Use it to compare outcomes and fair prices. It is not certainty; check the current app price and late team news before deciding.

es.title: Menos de 2,5 goles totales
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando el partido termina con 0, 1 o 2 goles totales tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 48.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.08 es su cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Úsalo para comparar resultados y cuotas justas. No es certeza; revisa la cuota actual y noticias tardías antes de decidir.

en.title: Both teams to score: Yes
en.category_meaning: This wins only when each team scores at least one goal after 90 minutes.
en.number_meaning: 55.1% is the model probability; 1.81 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare with the app's BTTS Yes price and inspect both teams' expected goals. One weak attack can make this fragile.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: Sí
es.category_meaning: Gana solo cuando cada equipo marca al menos un gol tras 90 minutos.
es.number_meaning: 55.1% es la probabilidad del modelo; 1.81 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara con la cuota Ambos marcan Sí y revisa los goles esperados de ambos equipos. Un ataque débil puede volverla frágil.

en.title: Both teams to score: No
en.category_meaning: This wins when at least one team finishes with zero goals.
en.number_meaning: 44.9% is the model probability; 2.23 is the fair decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Inspect the weaker team's expected goals and compare the current BTTS No price with the fair price.

es.title: Ambos equipos marcan: No
es.category_meaning: Gana cuando al menos un equipo termina con cero goles.
es.number_meaning: 44.9% es la probabilidad del modelo; 2.23 es la cuota decimal justa.
es.what_you_can_do: Revisa los goles esperados del equipo más débil y compara la cuota Ambos marcan No con la cuota justa.

en.title: Croatia -0.5 Asian handicap
en.category_meaning: At -0.5, the first listed team must win after 90 minutes; a draw or loss loses the selection.
en.number_meaning: 44.9% is the model win probability; 2.23 is the break-even decimal price.
en.what_you_can_do: Compare the current -0.5 price with the fair price. This is effectively a match-win bet without a draw refund.

es.title: Croacia -0,5 hándicap asiático
es.category_meaning: Con -0,5, el primer equipo debe ganar tras 90 minutos; empate o derrota pierde la selección.
es.number_meaning: 44.9% es la probabilidad de victoria del modelo; 2.23 es la cuota decimal de equilibrio.
es.what_you_can_do: Compara la cuota actual -0,5 con la cuota justa. Es equivalente a apostar por la victoria, sin devolución por empate.

Require chronological out-of-sample evidence before changing production thresholds.
